basic_details.job_title: DSWO Kancheepuram Centre Administrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Social Welfare Office Kancheepuram (DSWO Kancheepuram) Recruitment 2026: District Social Welfare Office Kancheepuram has released the official notification for Various posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid healthcare jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.details: The Centre Administrator would be a woman with willing to be available at One stop centre 24/7. She will be a residential staff attached to OSC. | The management of One Stop Centre could be outsourced to any woman having a Masters in Social Work, Counselling Psychology or Development Management with at least 4 years' experience of working on violence against women issues in an administrative set up with a Government or Non-Government project/programme and preferably with at least 1 years' experience of counselling either within or outside the same set-up.She should be a resident of the local community so that local human resource and expertise is utilised for effective functioning of the centre.

salary_details.details: Salary p. m. Rs. 30,000. No. of. Vacan

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for Selection Process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DSWO Kancheepuram Various Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kancheepuram.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DSWO Kancheepuram Various Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DSWO Kancheepuram Various Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DSWO Kancheepuram Centre Administrator Recruitment 2026 - Overview
DSWO Kancheepuram Centre Administrator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DSWO Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DSWO Kancheepuram Various Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The Centre Administrator would be a woman with willing to be available at One stop centre 24/7. She will be a residential staff attached to OSC. The management of One Stop Centre could be outsourced to any woman having a Masters in Social Work, Counselling Psychology or Development Management with at least 4 years' experience of working on violence against women issues in an administrative set up with a Government or Non-Government project/programme and preferably with at least 1 years' experience of counselling either within or outside the same set-up.She should be a resident of the local community so that local human resource and expertise is utilised for effective functioning of the centre.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Salary p. m. Rs. 30,000. No. of. Vacan

rows.event: Last date for submission of applications

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for Selection Process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DSWO Kancheepuram Various Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kancheepuram.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the District Social Welfare Office Kancheepuram (DSWO Kancheepuram).

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Various Posts, including Centre Admin, at the One Stop Centre in Kanchipuram.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for DSWO Kancheepuram Various Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for DSWO Kancheepuram Various Recruitment 2026 is Offline.

faq.question: Q5. What type of job is offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The jobs offered are on a Contract basis at the One Stop Centre.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a graduate and possess other specified educational qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available in DSWO Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Centre Admin post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the posts at DSWO Kancheepuram?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts will be on a Consolidated pay basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form for this recruitment?
faq.answer: You can download the application form from the official website, https://kancheepuram.nic.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for DSWO Kancheepuram?
faq.answer: The official website for District Social Welfare Office Kancheepuram is https://kancheepuram.nic.in/.
